methodology: KTLO objectives aligned to the merged internal-domain structure.
description: Keep-the-lights-on objectives for the internal domain.
okrDesignPrinciples: KTLO objectives protect reliability, trust, and core operating continuity across the full merged internal domain.

companyObjectives.title: KTLO Keep the internal operating system stable, trusted, and secure
companyObjectives.statement: Preserve reliability, patch posture, evidence quality, and supportability across the internal domain while broader structural work continues.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Internal KTLO objective
objectives.objective: Maintain platform reliability, workflow supportability, patch compliance, and control evidence quality across the merged internal domain.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline established from current operating telemetry
keyResults.statement: Increase Automation Success Rate during the quarter.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve Automation Success Rate through the team's owned workflow surfaces and product bricks.

supportingTeams.teamName: Control, Risk & Trust / Security and IT Operations
supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR with platform, data, or domain capabilities relevant to Automation Success Rate.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Pursue as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

target1.label: next quarter target
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Automation Success Rate moves materially in the right direction by next quarter.

target2.label: year-end target
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Automation Success Rate sustains improvement through year end.
